aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Competitive fire

💼 Career: Tum apni speed aur confidence se ek challenge crack kar loge

❤️ Love: Dominating tone avoid karo warna friction ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Smart risk beneficial ho sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Patience bhi power hai

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jeetna jaante ho, sustain karna nahi
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Calm stability

💼 Career: Slow but solid progress tumhe secure position dega

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust deepen hoga

💰 Money: Stable flow confidence dega

🧘 Advice: Routine pe trust rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhara patience tumhari real strength hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Distracted curiosity

💼 Career: Too many ideas execution ko weak kar sakte hain

❤️ Love: Mixed signals confusion create karenge

💰 Money: Random spending avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Focus narrow rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum excitement ke chakkar me consistency lose kar dete ho
cancer:
♋ Cancer

💼 Career: Intuition tumhe ek important insight degi

❤️ Love: Deep emotional connection feel hogi

💰 Money: Safe planning beneficial hai

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum answers already feel kar chuke hote ho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum shine tab karte ho jab validation chase nahi karte
